plugins.name: team-assessment
plugins.description: Assess your product team's AI autonomy maturity across 6 dimensions. Generates team-assessment.md and radar-chart.svg.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Multi-perspective AI council - get 3-5 expert viewpoints on any product question with adversarial debate, groupthink detection, and synthesis.

plugins.name: prototype
plugins.description: Autonomous prototype builder using the Generator-Evaluator Loop - generate, evaluate, and improve prototypes iteratively.
